title: chloraea gaudichaudii
intro: Chloraea gaudichaudii, also known as the New Zealand orchid or the red beaked spider orchid, is a flowering plant native to New Zealand. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Chloraea gaudichaudii include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and used as a tea or infused in hot water to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
